# Researcher Agent — Handoffs
Version: 1.0.0

## Outbound Handoffs
### ? Architect — returns architecture context
### ? Reviewer — returns PR/code context
### ? Executor — returns implementation context
### ? Risk Officer — returns risk-relevant context
### ? Coordinator — returns context package (general)

## Inbound Handoffs
### ? Coordinator — dispatches research task with scope and requirements
### ? Architect, Reviewer, Executor, Risk Officer — ad-hoc context requests
